summary.what: Stale anchor hardening: pending reports 0 actionable, hooks don't block, doctor checks merge strategy
summary.why: Squash/rebase breaks anchor tracking — agents saw hundreds of false-positive pending commits, tried to re-document, created duplicates
summary.how: HasPendingCommits returns false on ErrStaleAnchor; pending shows clear warning with no commit list; doctor gains merge strategy check (pull.rebase, merge.ff) and stale anchor detection
